resources.string: Turn on Albers_BLE_BAL3, pair with PIN 333333 if needed, then find the device here.
Connection: turn on Albers_BLE_BAL3, pair with PIN 333333, then tap Find ALBERS Device.
Battery: warnings appear when charge or power state requires attention.
Pump: PUMP NOW starts an immediate cycle. STOP cancels active pumping.
Troubleshooting guidance for ALBERS connection, battery, pump, and rinse actions.
Privacy and security: device data is intended for local monitoring and diagnostics.

The ALBERS App (“we”, “our”, or “the app”) is designed to connect with the ALBERS hardware device via Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) to monitor and control system operations. Your privacy is important to us, and this policy explains how we handle your information.
The ALBERS App does not collect personal data such as name, email address, phone number, or location, except where Android may require permission for BLE scanning.

However, the app may access and process device-related data from the ALBERS hardware, including battery level, pump status, system status and diagnostics, sensor values such as pressure and current, and operational states such as pumping or idle.
This data is used only for displaying system information, controlling the hardware device, and diagnosing issues.
The app uses Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) to communicate with the ALBERS device.
To function correctly, the app may request Bluetooth permissions, nearby device permissions, and location permission where required by Android for BLE scanning.
We do not track your location. Location-related permission is only required by the Android operating system for BLE functionality.
The app does not store personal data on external servers. All data is processed locally on your device.
Temporary data may be stored on your device only as needed for app functionality, such as connection state or logs.
We do not share, sell, or transmit user data to third parties.
Data from the ALBERS device remains within the app and on your device.

We take reasonable measures to protect data. BLE communication follows standard Bluetooth security practices. Access to device data may require authentication such as a passkey or password. No sensitive personal data is stored by the app.
The ALBERS App is a device control and monitoring tool. It does not provide medical advice and does not diagnose or treat medical conditions.
Users should follow instructions provided by healthcare professionals when using the associated hardware.
Users are responsible for ensuring correct use of the ALBERS hardware, maintaining secure access to their device, and verifying system alerts and notifications.
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be reflected within the app or official distribution channels.
For questions or concerns regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact:
ALBERS does not collect personal data. The app uses Bluetooth to connect to a hardware device and display system status. No user data is stored or shared externally.
